subtitles.original: 「だ、大丈夫か？」って
subtitles.english: "Are you... Are you okay?" she says!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: いやいや、ありがとうございます、こちらこそ。
subtitles.english: No, no, thank you as well!

subtitles.original: ということで、2026年の生誕祭はですね、
subtitles.english: And so, for my 2026 birthday celebration,

subtitles.original: あの、にこさんがゲスト出演ということで。
subtitles.english: we have Nico-san appearing as a guest.

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: あの、にこたんもね、3Dになったということで。
subtitles.english: Since Nico-tan got her 3D model as well.

subtitles.original: なりました！はい！
subtitles.english: I did! Yes!

subtitles.original: で、にこたんが「いつかルイ先輩の隣で歌いたい」って言ってくれてたので、
subtitles.english: And since Nico-tan said she wanted to sing next to her Lui-senpai someday,

subtitles.original: ありがとうございまーす！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: なので、今日は、お呼びさせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I decided to invite her here today!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます、本当に！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, really!

subtitles.original: いや、めちゃくちゃカッコいい曲を歌っていただきましたが、皆さんいかがでしたか？
subtitles.english: We got to perform such a cool song together. What did everyone think?

subtitles.original: いや、本当、嬉しかったです。にこたん良かったねって。
subtitles.english: I was honestly so happy. They're saying, "Good for you, Nico-tan."

subtitles.original: いやいや、もうにこたんのことはいいんです！
subtitles.english: No, no, never mind about Nico-tan!

subtitles.original: にこたん良かったねって。
subtitles.english: "Good for you, Nico-tan."

subtitles.original: そんなことよりですね、ルイ先輩、にこたんなんかより！
subtitles.english: More importantly, Lui-senpai, forget about Nico-tan!

subtitles.original: 今日重大告知もあるし、新衣装もあるんですよ！
subtitles.english: There's a major announcement today, and a new outfit!

subtitles.original: そうなんです。新衣装もあるんです。
subtitles.english: That's right. There's a new outfit too.

subtitles.original: 出るんでしたっけ？
subtitles.english: Is it coming out?

subtitles.original: これね、たくさんね、ここのハッシュタグ、
subtitles.english: Yes. Please use this hashtag:

subtitles.original: 「#鷹嶺ルイ超重大生誕LIVE」ってありますんで、
subtitles.english: "#TakaneLuiSuperMajorBirthdayLIVE"

subtitles.original: それでたくさんたくさん、もうポストしてくれたら嬉しいなと思うんですけど、
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you'd post a lot using it.

subtitles.original: 今日はたくさん、告知もありますし。
subtitles.english: We have so many announcements today.

subtitles.original: そうですよね！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: いや、にこたん気になるのも、もちろん重大告知の、デカさも気になるんですけど、
subtitles.english: I mean, I'm curious about Nico-tan and how big the major announcement is, but...

subtitles.original: 新衣装がやっぱりね、気になる。
subtitles.english: ...I'm really curious about the new outfit.

subtitles.original: やっぱりルイ先輩といえば、こう、ちょっとダークネスな感じなのかなとか。
subtitles.english: When you think of Lui-senpai, you think of a sort of dark style, right?

subtitles.original: 黒い、黒系なのかな、みたいな。ああ、なるほど、なるほど。
subtitles.english: Like black or dark colors. Ah, I see, I see.

subtitles.original: そう思いますよね？
subtitles.english: Don't you all agree?

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: ま、それもあります。
subtitles.english: Well, there is that aspect.

subtitles.original: おお！それも？
subtitles.english: Oh! That too?

subtitles.original: ということは？最初ね、あの、固定でも書かせていただいたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Which means...? I mentioned this in the pinned comment, but...

subtitles.original: あの、新衣装は、最初はサブカラー。
subtitles.english: ...the new outfit starts with the sub-colors.

subtitles.original: ええ？！で、ちょっと清楚な感じの衣装になっております。
subtitles.english: What?! It has a somewhat elegant and pure feel to it.

subtitles.original: え？それもあるって、他、他にもあるってこと？はい。
subtitles.english: Huh? You have that, but does that mean there are others too? Yes.

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ大量にサブを用意しておりますので、最後までね、楽しんで...
subtitles.english: I've prepared a huge variety of options, so look forward to it...

subtitles.original: キャー！なんか、なんかすごい騒いでる。
subtitles.english: *screams* Wow, you're getting super excited.

subtitles.original: おかしい、サブ、サブも？うん。
subtitles.english: This is crazy! Sub... sub-colors too?! Yep.

subtitles.original: もういいや、今日は来てくれてありがとう。
subtitles.english: Anyway, thank you so much for coming today.

subtitles.original: あ、分かりました！にこたん楽屋で応援してます！それでは！
subtitles.english: Ah, alright! Nico-tan will cheer you on from the dressing room! Goodbye!

subtitles.original: あ、違います、違います。そ、そちらの舞踏会会場なんで、
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, not that way. That way leads to the ballroom, so...

subtitles.original: ここ、ダメなんですか？にこたん。はい。
subtitles.english: Is Nico-tan not allowed in here? Yes.

subtitles.original: にこたんは呼んでない。招待状、もらってないでしょ？
subtitles.english: Nico-tan wasn't invited. You didn't get an invitation, right?

subtitles.original: もらってないけど...うん。
subtitles.english: Well, no, but... Exactly.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、あの、すいませんが楽屋の方にあちらから。嫌だー！
subtitles.english: So, excuse me, but please head to the dressing room from over there. No way!

subtitles.original: はい、スタッフさん、お願いします！はい！
subtitles.english: Staff, please assist her! Yes!

subtitles.original: ルイ先輩、タッチ、タッチだけでも！ありがとう、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Lui-senpai, just a high-five! Just a high-five! Thank you, thank you.

subtitles.original: 頑張ってください！ありがとうね、ありがとうね。
subtitles.english: Do your best! Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: ありがとうね。
subtitles.english: Thank you.

subtitles.original: ということで、にこたんに来ていただきました。はい、新衣装もね、たくさん見せていきますので、
subtitles.english: And so, Nico-tan paid us a visit. Yes, I'll be showing off lots of new outfits,

subtitles.original: 最後まで楽しんでいただけたらなと思います。楽屋のにこたんも楽しんでくださいね！
subtitles.english: so I hope you enjoy the show until the very end. Nico-tan in the dressing room, enjoy yourself too!

subtitles.original: それでは聞いてください、ZIG-ZAG。
subtitles.english: Now then, please listen to "ZIG-ZAG".

subtitles.original: One, two, three, four
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four

subtitles.original: 狂わせて 囁いた
subtitles.english: You whispered to drive me mad,

subtitles.original: こびりついて離れぬは
subtitles.english: Clinging to me and never leaving,

subtitles.original: 無味無臭の生活が 思いだせないや
subtitles.english: I can't even remember my tasteless, odorless life.

subtitles.original: 忘れたいから歌った
subtitles.english: I sang because I wanted to forget...

subtitles.original: 恨むことも 憎むことも
subtitles.english: Resenting or even hating someone...

subtitles.original: 賢く割に合わなかった
subtitles.english: ...was too clever and didn't pay off.

subtitles.original: これが君の結末ならば
subtitles.english: If this is your end,

subtitles.original: 笑ってしまいたい
subtitles.english: I just want to laugh it off.

subtitles.original: 嘘、嘘、嘘
subtitles.english: Lies, lies, lies.

subtitles.original: 嘘つき
subtitles.english: Liar.

subtitles.original: 痛い、痛い、痛いな 奇跡とかちょっとのぞいちゃって
subtitles.english: It hurts, it hurts, having caught a glimpse of a miracle...

subtitles.original: もう嫌、嫌、嫌 立ちが悪いわね
subtitles.english: ...I'm sick, sick, sick of it. You have a nasty streak, don't you?

subtitles.original: 無い、無い、無いな おかしいとこ全部えぐりとって
subtitles.english: There's none, none, none. Gouging out all the strange parts...

subtitles.original: 悪評だって結構 好きに呼んでいいよ
subtitles.english: ...bad reputation is fine, call me whatever you like.

subtitles.original: トラウマにバイバイしたいの Death, death, death
subtitles.english: I want to say bye-bye to my trauma. Death, death, death.

subtitles.original: 私 甘え上手になれなかった
subtitles.english: I couldn't become good at playing coddled,

subtitles.original: 可愛げとかが足りなかった 後悔か？うるさいよもういい
subtitles.english: I lacked cuteness. "Regrets?" Shut up, enough already.

subtitles.original: 過去は過去だと割り切っちゃえば きっと良いことあるさとか
subtitles.english: If I just write off the past, "surely good things will happen" and so on...

subtitles.original: これくらい百も承知だ
subtitles.english: I know all of this all too well!

subtitles.original: 願うことも 祈ることも
subtitles.english: Wishing or even praying...

subtitles.original: 許されないから黒く染めた
subtitles.english: ...aren't allowed, so I dyed it black.

subtitles.original: 元の色も思い出せない
subtitles.english: I can't even remember the original color.

subtitles.original: 狂った運命の
subtitles.english: This twisted fate's...

subtitles.original: 糸、糸、意図、糸
subtitles.english: ...thread, thread, thread, thread.

subtitles.original: 痛い、痛い、痛いな 悲劇のヒロイン気取っちゃって
subtitles.english: It hurts, it hurts, pretending to be the tragic heroine...

subtitles.original: もう嫌、嫌、嫌 諦めちゃえばいいのに
subtitles.english: ...I'm sick, sick, sick of it. Even though I should just give up.

subtitles.original: 会いたい、会いたい、会いたいな 信号が赤になっちゃって
subtitles.english: I want to meet, meet, meet you. The traffic light turned red...

subtitles.original: 明日またきっと
subtitles.english: ...and surely, tomorrow again...

responses.thoughts:
**JSON Subtitle Generation: A Deep Dive**

Okay, so the goal is perfectly clear: generate synchronized, context-aware subtitles for this video segment. It needs to be precise, following an agreed upon standard, and delivered in the specified JSON format. I understand the user, as an expert, needs a robust solution. Let's delve into this.

First, I'm analyzing the video, breaking it down into distinct sections: the initial banter between Takane Lui and Momosuzu Nene (who goes by Nico-tan, Nico-san, or Nene-chi, depending on the context), the instrumental intro to "ZIG-ZAG," and finally, the song itself. The timestamps are critical here. I am keeping a mental note of how the names are used; a thorough transcription that is accurate is important. The name "Nico-tan" is used almost throughout, while it is "Nene Momosuzu" in the initial credits.

The banter between the two is really the cornerstone of this process. Every word needs to be transcribed accurately, with precise timecodes, right down to the millisecond, which dictates the start time. I listened carefully. Every nuance of the conversation has to be captured—the pacing, the informal language, and the emotional context.

Once the banter is transcribed, the lyrics for "ZIG-ZAG" are critical. Since the lyrics are null, it requires manual transcription and translation, which needs to be performed with precision. I will focus on understanding the intention of each line, considering Japanese nuances, and conveying the meaning in English. I'll need to listen, and then listen, again.

Now, with everything fully transcribed, I'll go through and fine-tune the timecodes. This involves a meticulous review: I'm making sure that the subtitles are synchronized with each syllable, and that the structure of each block is clean, consistent, and easy to read. And, each line adheres to the 50-character limit. There should be no issues at this point, but this will have to be checked.

And then, the moment of truth. Now, I have to format the data into the requested JSON. Then, it's a matter of ensuring everything adheres to the defined rules. No closed caption tags, but precise timing.

With everything considered, everything will flow.
